- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (recreated after scaffold)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (React + TypeScript + Vite, Tailwind, npm)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (Vite react-ts via create-vite)

- [x] Customize the Project (routing, API client, base UI scaffold)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (none required)

- [x] Compile the Project (npm run build)

- [x] Create and Run Task (no task needed)

- [ ] Launch the Project (awaiting confirmation)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README updated, HTML comments removed)

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
